awards.description: Champ Ring amount shown in row.

notes: The screenshot uses placement-based columns plus Champ Ring and a header labeled Rollover to 2023.
The Amount Won column includes weekly payouts, placement payouts, and Champ Ring where applicable in this season.
Earl shows Entry Fee Paid as $10 and Rollover to 2023 as -$40; those values are preserved exactly as shown.
The footer shows Weekly Payout $140, Champ Ring $16, 4th Place $25, 3rd Place $50, 2nd Place $100, 1st Place $269, Amount Won $600, Entry Fee Paid $560, Rollover to 2023 -$40, and Total Earned $40.
newOwnerFee and futureDeposit are null because the screenshot does not label any amount as a new-owner fee or future deposit; rollover values are captured in notes only.
regularSeasonWeeks and actualRingCost are null because they are not shown.
